title: GPU's dream
description:
Let your graphics card fight alongside you!
Updates have now stopped
body: Let you fight side by side with your graphics card! This is a mod that uses graphics cards as weapons, adding some graphics cards (with exclusive animations). Currently, it only features reference design graphics cards.![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f065d5cd3260cd8a3343ff115fb31f6313e353c.png)
